posts.text: Yesterday, members of the @DeepFission $FISN team had the honor of ringing the @NasdaqExchange Closing Bell. While we were proud to celebrate this milestone together, our focus remains the same ➡️ advancing a practical path toward commercial deployment to help deliver reliable, affordable #NuclearEnergy. Thank you to our employees, partners, supporters, and shareholders for helping make this progress possible. Closing Bell replay: https://www.nasdaq.com/events/deep-fission-rings-closing-bell Learn more: https://www.deepfission.com/technology #Nuclear #FISN #NasdaqListed #Nasdaq #TimesSquare
posts.author: quakes99

posts.author: tferriss

posts.text: Gold is entering a historically favorable period of the year: Gold prices have gained +1.5% in July on average over the last 20 years, making it the 2nd-strongest month of the year. Gold prices have also recorded positive returns in 65% of July months, the 2nd-best win rate of any month. The strongest July over this period was in 2020, when gold returned +10.7%. The only better month historically has been August, with an average gain of +1.6% since 2005. August also posted a 55% win rate, with its strongest year coming in 2011, when gold returned +12.1%. By comparison, June has historically been the weakest month, with an average decline of -0.4% and just 40% positive readings since 2005. Seasonality is turning in favor of gold bulls.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
